examples: Tunny, you arrived at the right moment!
I am the Tunny, your companion in the Shark's stomach.
It is I, a poor Tunny swallowed by the Shark at the same time as you.
"He was involved in cracking a code which the Germans called Lorenz, Britain called it Tunny, " he said.
Mr Roberts, of Hampshire, was among four founder members of the Testery section tasked with breaking the German High Command's Tunny code.
